_notes: LinkedIn account pool for outbound DM + invite rotation.
Each account = its own Chrome profile + its own CDP port.
Sticky routing: dispatcher hashes lead_id into a slot so same prospect never sees two accounts.
Per-account daily_cap respected by kill_switches.record_send / record_auth_failure.
Add burner accounts by: 1) new Chrome profile dir, 2) new LaunchAgent on fresh port, 3) append here.

accounts.name: vlad-main
accounts.notes: Vladislav's primary LinkedIn — use for high-value warm DMs, not cold volume
